title: Numpy random generator should be preferred to NumPyRandomRandomState
description: Using NumPyRandomRandomState instead of NumPy random generators might lead to unintended state sharing, which can cause inconsistent results.
message: Prefer NumPy random generators over NumPyRandomRandomState

noncompliant.code:
import numpy as np
random_state = np.random.RandomState()
random_state.random()

compliant.code:
import numpy as np
random_generator = np.random.Random()
random_generator.random()

why_is_this_an_issue: NumPyRandomRandomState can lead to unintended state sharing, while NumPy random generators are thread-safe and do not share state.
how_to_fix: Replace NumPyRandomRandomState with NumPy random generators

metadata.title: Numpy random generator should be preferred to NumPyRandomRandomState
